page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores utilizing the AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.55 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the processor demonstrates strong single-core performance, as evidenced by a stress-ng single-core score of 2695.88 and a strong PassMark CPU encryption test result of 34027.47. Memory subsystem performance is highlighted by a strong PassMark memory score of 2870.11, though large-block uncached memory write bandwidth is relatively weak at 18.93 GB/sec. Multi-core performance, software compilation, and database operations consistently fall within the average tier, with a PassMark CPU score of 35975.46 and a multi-core Geekbench score of 11288.0.

The primary tradeoffs of this instance include the complete absence of local storage and a moderate baseline network speed of 8 Gbps, which may limit I/O-heavy applications. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated AMD EPYC hardware profile offers a balanced resource density suitable for enterprise workloads without the premium of specialized compute or memory-optimized instances. This configuration is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, including static web serving, database operations, software compilation, and small-scale language model text generation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 cores running at 2.55 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPU accelerators, it relies on network-attached storage and provides an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU performance and memory encryption capabilities, alongside average multi-core and database execution speeds, though uncached large-block memory write bandwidth is a notable bottleneck. This instance offers a balanced resource profile, making it a qualitatively cost-effective option for standard enterprise applications, web serving, software compilation, and database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core and encryption performance.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and strong single-core performance for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 cores with 128 GB of system memory
Strong single-core CPU and memory encryption benchmark results
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Suitable for web serving, database operations, and software compilation
